steps.title: Recognize the audience's prior knowledge
steps.content: The audience is already familiar with seedling emergence, so the answer should not waste space explaining what it is.

steps.title: Find the answer that respects this constraint
steps.content: D states the study's finding (positive effect of plant litter on seedling emergence) in its specific environmental context (mesic grassland, dry midlatitude climate). A only mentions the publication year without stating what was found, C vaguely discusses the topic without clearly presenting the conclusion, and B includes an unnecessary definition of seedling emergence. That matches choice D — D is correct.
